entities.name: God
entities.raw_quote: the living God... who lives and reigns through all the ages of the ages.

entities.name: Holy Trinity

attributes.composition: one God in Trinity, and Trinity in Unity

entities.raw_quote: That we worship one God in Trinity, and Trinity in Unity, neither confounding the persons, nor dividing the substance.

entities.name: Virgin Mary
entities.raw_quote: O glorious Mary, eternal virgin, glorious mother, mother of the church, mother of piety and leniency

entities.name: Jesus Christ
entities.raw_quote: Perfect God, and perfect Man, of a reasonable soul and human flesh subsisting.

entities.name: Holy Spirit
entities.raw_quote: the Holy Spirit, the holy Catholic Church, the communion of Saints

entities.name: Angels

attributes.interaction: assembled together with men in operation

entities.raw_quote: the same angels, who are pure, are assembled together with men.

entities.name: Penance and Confession

attributes.requirement: necessary for seeing the divine vision

entities.raw_quote: First he must perform true penance and confession.

entities.name: Clean Garments
entities.raw_quote: His garments must not be foul-smelling, but rather they must be new or very cleanly washed.

entities.name: Prayer 1 (Invocation)
entities.raw_quote: Direct, we beg you, O Lord, our actions by your holy inspirations...

entities.name: Prayer 2 (Ave Maria)
entities.raw_quote: Hail Mary, full of grace, the Lord is with thee.

entities.name: Prayer 3 (Salve Regina)
entities.raw_quote: Hail holy queen, mother of mercy, Hail our life, our sweetness, and our hope.

entities.name: Prayer 4 (Litany of Mary)
entities.raw_quote: O glorious Mary, eternal virgin, glorious mother, mother of the church...

entities.name: Prayer 5 (Sacred Names of Mary)

attributes.method: naming with heart, mouth, and labor

entities.raw_quote: So you are named Mary, Creator, Mother, Bride, Daughter, Theotan, Rod, Vessel...

entities.name: Prayer 6 (The Creed)
entities.raw_quote: I believe in God, the Father Almighty, Creator of heaven and earth...

entities.name: Prayer 7 (Athanasian Creed)

attributes.purpose: to hold the Catholic faith for salvation/vision

entities.raw_quote: Whoever wishes to be saved and have the vision of God, should above all things hold to the Catholic faith.

summary: This chunk details the spiritual and physical preparations required for the divine vision, including penance, cleanliness, and constant prayer. It provides a collection of liturgical prayers focused on the Virgin Mary, the Holy Trinity, and the Apostles' Creed to establish necessary faith.
key_passages: First he must perform true penance and confession. He must separate himself from women, and from seeing them.
the same angels, who are pure, are assembled together with men. Therefore they greatly desire clean garments
Direct, we beg you, O Lord, our actions by your holy inspirations, and carry them on by your gracious assistance
So you are named Mary, Creator, Mother, Bride, Daughter, Theotan, Rod, Vessel, Balsamus, Cloud, Dew
That we worship one God in Trinity, and Trinity in Unity, neither confounding the persons, nor dividing the substance.
